reference: I haven't been working for a while now because I am a full-time student. Last week, I worked for three consecutive days standing, moving, and walking around for seven to eight straight hours. Then I slowly realized that my lower back hurts a lot, and now I am at school it still hurts, but not as much as it used to. So why does my lower back hurt?
